subject: Fwd: Cal PINES

Before construction can begin according to the County.
Well and Septic must be in place.
Connor Well or Modoc Drilling
guestimate 50k

Get address for site for Fire Department
Jackie 6am - 2pm
530-640-1057

Evironmental Health Department
530-233-6310
Well permit aroung $90.00
Soil evaluation $180.00
Sewage Permit $200 - $500.00

Zoned for residential
Plans for conventional framing

If plans changed to steele will require engineering

Sheriff 530-233-4416
Planning 530-233-6406
Country
